displayTitle: Classic Star Wars: The Vandelhelm Mission
synopsis: Following the events of Return of the Jedi, the Alliance tries to rebuild its fleet at the starship yards of Fondor. When a supply problem threatens the rebuilding, Lando Calrissian sends Han Solo and Nien Nunb to the planet Vandelhelm, where Solo realizes that it doesn't always pay to listen to Lando!
title: Classic Star Wars: The Vandelhelm Mission
